title: Tests failing during build on ppc64le architecture
body:
(Edited to try and make it a bit more readable in GitHub.  No content removed, only comment blocks added)
Hi All,
I am trying to build skopeo on travis-ci for ppc64le architecture. But failing to run two of the test cases. Below are the logs
```
---------------------------------------------------------------------
FAIL: sync_test.go:170: SyncSuite.TestDocker2DirUntagged
```

comments.body:
FAIL: sync_test.go:170: SyncSuite.TestDocker2DirUntagged
FAIL: sync_test.go:195: SyncSuite.TestYamlUntagged  are the tests which are failing
Thanks for your report. The tests will probably need to add `--override-arch amd64`; care to prepare a PR?

> Thanks for your report. The tests will probably need to add `--override-arch amd64`; care to prepare a PR?

Sure. Soon will be back with PR. Thanks for your help
@kishorkunal-raj DId you ever open a PR?
This might have been fixed as a side-effect #1146 . @kishorkunal-raj can you re-test, please? And if it is not fixed, could you prepare a PR?
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.

Closing.

@kishorkunal-raj if you get the chance to test, please reopen this issue if it isn't fixed.
